## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss progress on content generation project and align on next steps for Guillaume Cabane's thought leadership content.](https://fathom.video/share/JhFzg6xCPYqsuZGBCYEzX1nczxHdVVEy?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Two content approaches emerged: long-form articles from keynotes and short-form posts from conversation snippets](https://fathom.video/share/JhFzg6xCPYqsuZGBCYEzX1nczxHdVVEy?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [Need to create a categorization system for content snippets (theme, format, audience)](https://fathom.video/share/JhFzg6xCPYqsuZGBCYEzX1nczxHdVVEy?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)
  - [Writing style should be direct, concise, technical, and make bold predictions](https://fathom.video/share/JhFzg6xCPYqsuZGBCYEzX1nczxHdVVEy?tab=summary&timestamp=2026.0)
  - [New content pillar idea: Guillaume's ability to pick startup winners and advisory approach](https://fathom.video/share/JhFzg6xCPYqsuZGBCYEzX1nczxHdVVEy?tab=summary&timestamp=2197.0)

## Topics

### Current Project Status

  - [Transcribed 4-5 of Guillaume's 2025 talks as starting point](https://fathom.video/share/JhFzg6xCPYqsuZGBCYEzX1nczxHdVVEy?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
  - [Created artifacts: audience personas, company brief, writing guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/JhFzg6xCPYqsuZGBCYEzX1nczxHdVVEy?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)
  - [Developed content suggestions based on transcripts](https://fathom.video/share/JhFzg6xCPYqsuZGBCYEzX1nczxHdVVEy?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)
  - [Atlas AI platform will use artifacts to generate content](https://fathom.video/share/JhFzg6xCPYqsuZGBCYEzX1nczxHdVVEy?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)

### Content Generation Approaches

  - [Long-form articles:](https://fathom.video/share/JhFzg6xCPYqsuZGBCYEzX1nczxHdVVEy?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
      - [Based on keynote transcripts](https://fathom.video/share/JhFzg6xCPYqsuZGBCYEzX1nczxHdVVEy?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
      - [More thoughtful, editorial-style content](https://fathom.video/share/JhFzg6xCPYqsuZGBCYEzX1nczxHdVVEy?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
      - [11 out of 18 suggested topics approved](https://fathom.video/share/JhFzg6xCPYqsuZGBCYEzX1nczxHdVVEy?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [Short-form posts:](https://fathom.video/share/JhFzg6xCPYqsuZGBCYEzX1nczxHdVVEy?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
      - [Based on conversation snippets (1-2 minutes each)](https://fathom.video/share/JhFzg6xCPYqsuZGBCYEzX1nczxHdVVEy?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
      - [More immediate, "hot take" style content](https://fathom.video/share/JhFzg6xCPYqsuZGBCYEzX1nczxHdVVEy?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
      - [Closer to Guillaume's original vision](https://fathom.video/share/JhFzg6xCPYqsuZGBCYEzX1nczxHdVVEy?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)

### Content Snippet Workflow

  - [Need 2-3 snippets minimum per topic](https://fathom.video/share/JhFzg6xCPYqsuZGBCYEzX1nczxHdVVEy?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)
  - [Categorize snippets by theme, format (length), and target audience](https://fathom.video/share/JhFzg6xCPYqsuZGBCYEzX1nczxHdVVEy?tab=summary&timestamp=1552.0)
  - [Guillaume and team to create Google Sheet with categorized snippets](https://fathom.video/share/JhFzg6xCPYqsuZGBCYEzX1nczxHdVVEy?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)
  - [Daniel (CTO) to develop custom workflow in Atlas for snippet processing](https://fathom.video/share/JhFzg6xCPYqsuZGBCYEzX1nczxHdVVEy?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)

### Writing Style and Tone

  - [Aspire to Paul Graham's style: complex thoughts presented clearly](https://fathom.video/share/JhFzg6xCPYqsuZGBCYEzX1nczxHdVVEy?tab=summary&timestamp=1900.0)
  - [Remove fluff and buzzwords, be direct and concise](https://fathom.video/share/JhFzg6xCPYqsuZGBCYEzX1nczxHdVVEy?tab=summary&timestamp=2026.0)
  - [Controversial and technical content is preferred](https://fathom.video/share/JhFzg6xCPYqsuZGBCYEzX1nczxHdVVEy?tab=summary&timestamp=2026.0)
  - [Make bold predictions and express clear preferences](https://fathom.video/share/JhFzg6xCPYqsuZGBCYEzX1nczxHdVVEy?tab=summary&timestamp=2072.0)
  - [Avoid noncommittal "it depends on your situation" conclusions](https://fathom.video/share/JhFzg6xCPYqsuZGBCYEzX1nczxHdVVEy?tab=summary&timestamp=2046.0)

### New Content Pillar: Picking Winners

  - [Leverage Guillaume's track record of successful startups](https://fathom.video/share/JhFzg6xCPYqsuZGBCYEzX1nczxHdVVEy?tab=summary&timestamp=2174.0)
  - [Explain advisory approach as better than traditional employment](https://fathom.video/share/JhFzg6xCPYqsuZGBCYEzX1nczxHdVVEy?tab=summary&timestamp=2207.0)
  - [Discuss why employees get "short stick" in startup equity](https://fathom.video/share/JhFzg6xCPYqsuZGBCYEzX1nczxHdVVEy?tab=summary&timestamp=2289.0)
  - [Emphasize importance of making multiple bets in parallel](https://fathom.video/share/JhFzg6xCPYqsuZGBCYEzX1nczxHdVVEy?tab=summary&timestamp=2317.0)

### SEO Considerations

  - [Current search volume for Growth.li is low, mostly brand-related](https://fathom.video/share/JhFzg6xCPYqsuZGBCYEzX1nczxHdVVEy?tab=summary&timestamp=2568.0)
  - [Potential to target existing search queries with opinionated takes](https://fathom.video/share/JhFzg6xCPYqsuZGBCYEzX1nczxHdVVEy?tab=summary&timestamp=2468.0)
  - ["Go To Market Engineer" is one non-branded query with potential](https://fathom.video/share/JhFzg6xCPYqsuZGBCYEzX1nczxHdVVEy?tab=summary&timestamp=2550.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Aida to brief Daniel on custom workflow requirements for Atlas](https://fathom.video/share/JhFzg6xCPYqsuZGBCYEzX1nczxHdVVEy?tab=summary&timestamp=1839.0)
  - [Create categorization system for content snippets in Google Sheets](https://fathom.video/share/JhFzg6xCPYqsuZGBCYEzX1nczxHdVVEy?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)
  - [Aida to produce initial draft (intro + H2) for review within days](https://fathom.video/share/JhFzg6xCPYqsuZGBCYEzX1nczxHdVVEy?tab=summary&timestamp=1872.0)
  - [Guillaume to record podcast with Marcel next week, providing new content](https://fathom.video/share/JhFzg6xCPYqsuZGBCYEzX1nczxHdVVEy?tab=summary&timestamp=2418.0)
  - [Explore injecting Guillaume's POV into SEO-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/JhFzg6xCPYqsuZGBCYEzX1nczxHdVVEy?tab=summary&timestamp=2468.0)
